contacts.project: Utica Shale Operations - EAP OHIO LLC
contacts.whyGoodFit: Tuscarawas County drilling operations are 35 miles from Cambridge with crews needing 2-6 month extended stays

draftEmail.subject: Crew lodging for Tuscarawas County drilling - weekly rates $350
draftEmail.body:
Hi there,

Saw your Utica Shale operations in Tuscarawas County and wanted to reach out about crew lodging. We're right off I-77 at Exit 178, about 35 minutes from your MILL Township sites.

Special weekly crew rate: $350/week (saves over $100 vs. nightly booking). Group discount: $55/night when booking 5+ rooms. Extended stay 30+ days: call me directly for a custom rate.

We've got truck/trailer parking, free breakfast to save per diem dollars, laundry on-site, and microwave/fridge in every room. Happy to work with you on whatever your crews need.

Best regards,
General Manager
Days Inn by Wyndham Cambridge
2328 Southgate Parkway, Cambridge, OH 43725
Phone: 740-432-5691
